command: echo  | base64 -d > /opt/moreno-memory/scripts/nightly-backup.sh && chmod +x /opt/moreno-memory/scripts/nightly-backup.sh && (crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -v nightly-backup; echo "0 3 * * * /opt/moreno-memory/scripts/nightly-backup.sh") | crontab - && crontab -l | grep backup && echo BACKUP_CRON_INSTALLED
